title: Accounting — Core Identity
description: Accounting equation, debits/credits table, close-the-books flowchart.

blocks.title: Debit / credit
blocks.markdown:
| Account | Debit | Credit |
|---------|-------|--------|
| Asset | ↑ | ↓ |
| Liability | ↓ | ↑ |
| Equity | ↓ | ↑ |
| Revenue | ↓ | ↑ |
| Expense | ↑ | ↓ |

blocks.title: Journal entry flow
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[Transaction] --> B[Identify accounts]
  B --> C[Debit / credit]
  C --> D[Journal]
  D --> E[Ledger / TB]
  E --> F[FS]
